hero.heading: Family is everything.
hero.lede: A continuing project to gather, verify and share the history of the Byrne family — names, places, photographs and the stories behind them.

recent.heading: New to the archive this month

quote.text: Family is not an important thing. It's everything.

tree.heading: Four generations, and counting
tree.body: The tree currently traces the Byrne line back to early-19th-century Connacht, with branches into Whelan, Maguire and McHale families. Every person card links to source documents — birth certificates, parish records, ship manifests — so anyone can check the working.
